reference.rule: Use endpoint-source.catalog.yaml and endpoint-coverage.matrix.yaml before improvising any method-path pair.
Preserve user-supplied reference URLs as first-class provenance.
When a supplied page slug contains a clear typo, preserve the supplied slug and state the canonical operation name.
Prefer official docs pages for OAuth, scopes, rate limits, errors, hierarchy, and public-vs-enterprise boundaries.

When surfacing response body shape to a developer, prefer body_shape_inline from the contract's 200 response block — it is fully dereferenced and self-contained, requiring no $ref resolution. The $ref form (body_shape) is retained for machine consumers.
When surfacing error shape, use inline_error_envelope from the contract top level. It contains code, message, and details[] without a ref hop.
Code examples in each contract are near-runnable: path parameters are declared as env-var-backed variables at the top of each snippet. Present them as-is; do not strip the variable declarations.
